name: default
description: JSON sibling of the feature-flags template: the flag set as machine-readable config data — each flag with its key, description, rollout, enabled state, and meta. The agent expands the flags[] exemplar per flag.

slots.description: Flag config entries; expand the exemplar object per flag.

shape.flag[]: { key: string, description: string, rollout: string (optional), enabled: boolean, meta: string (optional) }
